description: Flash flood detected due to heavy rainfall. Traffic blocked and vehicles stranded.
recommendedActions: Dispatch Emergency Units to Sector G-10/4
Send SMS Alert to Residents in 2km radius
explanation: Based on NLP analysis of citizen reports ('G-10 mein pani bhar gaya hai') correlated with local weather station data and live traffic density patterns, AI concludes a 92% probability of severe urban flooding. Immediate intervention recommended to prevent casualties.

recommendedActions: Dispatch Fire Tenders from F-8 Station
explanation: Multiple social media signals indicating smoke. Confidence is medium pending visual confirmation from smart cameras.
